mapper.select:
select id, name, introduction, district_id, district_name, city_id, city_name, province_id, province_name, address_detail, latitude, longitude, phone, is_release, ai.is_deleted, ifnull(ri.cot,0) as total_room_count, ifnull(ri.cot,0) - ifnull(la.cot, 0) as free_room_count from apartment_info ai left join ( # 房间总数 select apartment_id, count(*) cot from room_info where is_deleted = 0 and is_release = 1 group by apartment_id) ri on ri.apartment_id = ai.id left join ( # 已出租的房间数 select apartment_id, count(*) cot from lease_agreement where is_deleted = 0 and status in (2, 5) group by apartment_id) la on la.apartment_id = ai.id
is_deleted = 0 and province_id = #{queryVo.provinceId} and city_id = #{queryVo.cityId} and district_id = #{queryVo.districtId}
